codeReview.summary: The fix commit does remove timeout masking by isolating compare-suite DeFiLlama calls in `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts`, and current HEAD has separate onchain tests that prove live catalog behavior. However, the reviewed feature still fails its own contract because the handoff commit `3aebd7e` is only a single-file test change and does not itself fully contain the live onchain implementation it claims remains covered. That leaves commit attribution incomplete for this feature review, exactly as the feature description warned against.

issues.description: Commit `3aebd7e` only adds compare-suite DeFiLlama spies/restores in `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts`. The feature contract explicitly requires 'Ensure the handoff commit fully contains the claimed implementation,' but `git show --stat 3aebd7e` shows no runtime or onchain-catalog code and no route-proof additions. The handoff therefore attributes broader onchain behavior to a commit that only changes test isolation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `onchain-api-worker` skill does not explicitly guard against handing off a fix feature whose commit proves only part of the claimed scope, even when the feature description requires the commit itself to fully contain the implementation being reviewed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `features.json` for `remove-timeout-masking-from-onchain-compare-coverage` requires: 'Ensure the handoff commit fully contains the claimed implementation.' Session `1cd27a87-e02f-44d5-ac1f-843dfc779fe2` handed off commit `3aebd7e`, but `git show --stat 3aebd7e` shows only `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts` changed while the handoff claims live onchain behavior remains covered elsewhere.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed review, mission metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, current-head tests, and commit `3aebd7e`. The timeout-padding issue itself was fixed via targeted test isolation, but this fix review still fails because the assigned feature required the handoff commit to fully contain the claimed implementation and the commit is test-only.
